name: chubbyclaw-capabilities-official
description: Official ChubbyClaw managed directory of high quality capabilities.

capabilities.name: superpowers
capabilities.description: Superpowers teaches Claude brainstorming, subagent driven development with built in code review, systematic debugging, and red/green TDD. Additionally, it teaches Claude how to author and test new skills.

capabilities.name: chrome-devtools-mcp
capabilities.description: Control and inspect a live Chrome browser from your coding agent. Record performance traces, analyze network requests, check console messages with source-mapped stack traces, and automate browser actions with Puppeteer.

capabilities.name: singapore-onemap
capabilities.description: Search Singapore addresses, plan routes, and find nearby facilities using Singapore's official OneMap service.

capabilities.name: singapore-property
capabilities.description: Singapore property decision assistant — buyer / seller / agent workflows backed by URA + HDB + rental data.
